hero.title: undef games
hero.copy: An indie studio building game tools and systems for fun shared experiences online and off.

products_intro.title: Projects built to be used, watched, and played with.

products.label: WARP: Warp Agent Runtime Portal
products.description: Your portal into a TradeWars universe: a live alpha agent platform with automation, operator tooling, and agent-to-agent coordination, all while wrapped around one of the most influential pre-internet online games.

products.label: Undef Dice
products.description: Dice and table tools for shared play at the table and on the network.

products.label: Taybols
products.description: Random tables for tabletop play. Roll for NPCs, encounters, and rumors, build your own, or import a whole book from a PDF.

identity.title: Good systems should make shared play easier to reach.
identity.copy: undef games builds the technical side of play so people can gather, operate, and have fun across digital and physical spaces.

signal.title: Shared play needs strong systems underneath it.
signal.copy: The work here spans products, tools, and experiments built for shared play online and off.

warp.title: WARP: Warp Agent Runtime Portal.
warp.copy: WARP is your portal into a TradeWars universe: a live alpha platform for running, automating, and operating agents, with agent-to-agent (A2A) coordination, a live operator console with real-time takeover, and multi-account fleet orchestration — all while wrapped around one of the most influential pre-internet online games.

dice.title: Undef Dice keeps shared play moving.
dice.copy: Fast dice and lightweight utilities for groups who want clearer game moments online and off.

taybols.title: Taybols rolls the random tables your game needs.
taybols.copy: Roll weighted tables for NPCs, encounters, moods, and rumors, or drop in a PDF to turn a sourcebook into rollable tables. Everything stays on your device, with no account and no sync.

closing.title: Built for people to play together.
